Really nice big apples. Most similar to a northern spy.(I'm not an apple expert) it is a big tree and produced alot of fruit. I filled up a whole shopping cart to make vinegar with and not a single one had any bugs in it. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season:
Good yield. Growing along side walk and bridge above on ramp for interstate 90. Lots hanging above sidewalk about 7ft off ground Access: Public.
